member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.PerformanceProfile.PrimePerformanceProfileTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method to set global Prime Profile, and Tos Api Profile.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.PerformanceProfile.PrimePerformanceProfileTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.PerformanceService.IPerformanceService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PerformanceProfile.PrimePerformanceProfileTestMethod.GlobalInstanceSummaryMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for test time summary mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.PerformanceProfile.PrimePerformanceProfileTestMethod.MemorySummary
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for memory summary mode.
